commit.message:
Stream model response, improve error handling, handle 0 watched repos

- Stream model output via SSE so results appear as they generate
  instead of waiting for the full response
- Check exit codes from parallel background API fetches and surface
  errors with context
- Handle null/empty results from jq pagination safely
- When user has 0 watched repos, recommend broadly useful repos
  based on popularity and org coverage instead of failing
- Add MIT LICENSE file

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add chat bridge endpoint, fix CORS, wire Blazor chat UI

- POST /api/agui/chat: New bridge endpoint for free-text chat input
  - Extracts intent via regex: SKU-\d+, \.XX, competitor names
  - Returns 202 Accepted with sessionId + streamUrl
  - Launches background orchestration (ChiefSoftwareArchitectAgent)
  - Defaults to SKU-100, MegaMart, \.99 for underspecified inputs

- CORS fix: Replace hardcoded localhost:7001/7089 with env-aware policy
  - Development: SetIsOriginAllowed(origin => origin.Host == "localhost")
  - Production: Explicit AllowedOrigins:Web configuration
  - Dynamic Aspire service discovery for local development

- AgUiStreamService: Two-step chat bridge flow
  - Step 1: POST /api/agui/chat -> extract sessionId (202 response)
  - Step 2: GET /api/agui?sessionId=... -> subscribe to SSE stream
  - 500ms delay between steps for orchestration initialization
  - Added "Connecting to agent stream..." status feedback

Tests: 178 passing (API), 13/13 passing (Web)
Build: 0 errors

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Improve prompt: system/user split, interest themes, cleaner output

- Split into system message (persona, process, rules, format) and
  user message (data only) for better instruction following
- Ask the model to infer interest themes before matching, improving
  relevance and diversity of recommendations
- Guard against suggesting Discussions when discussions are disabled
- Cleaner terminal-friendly output format (no markdown headers)
- Prefer diversity across interest themes over clustering

commit.message:
Speed up: parallel API calls, drop full pagination

Fetch watched repos (1 page) and org repos (2 pages) in parallel
instead of sequentially paginating everything. For the github org
this drops from 7+ sequential requests to 3 concurrent ones.

commit.message:
Fix invalid hook call error caused by duplicate React instances (#2074)

`pnpm` was resolving two React versions simultaneously — `react@19.2.3`
(pulled in by `react-reconciler@0.32.0` via `ink`) and `react@19.2.4`
(everywhere else) — causing a fatal hooks error on `pnpm run dev`.

## Changes

- **`package.json`**: Add `pnpm.overrides` to pin `react` to `19.2.4`
across all dependencies

```json
"pnpm": {
  "overrides": {
    "react": "19.2.4"
  }
}
```

- **`pnpm-lock.yaml`**: Regenerated — `react@19.2.3` entry removed, all
packages now resolve to `react@19.2.4`

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: jonstacks <6900888+jonstacks@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix unbound variable: replace Unicode ellipsis with ASCII

Bash with set -u interprets the … (U+2026) as part of the variable
name, causing an unbound variable error.

Release v0.3.1

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove Sonar integration and repository artifacts (#378)

This PR removes SonarCloud/SonarQube integration from the repository and
CI surface area. It strips the remaining Sonar-specific workflow,
tooling, configuration, and metadata artifacts so no Sonar dependency
remains.

- **CI workflow**
  - Removed `SONAR_TOKEN` from `.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml`.
- Eliminates Sonar-specific secret plumbing from the test job
environment.

- **Local automation (nox)**
  - Removed the Sonar submission block from `noxfile.py:test()`:
    - token gating via `SONAR_TOKEN`
    - Sonar scanner unzip/bootstrap from `.test_deps`
    - `sonar-scanner` execution
    - Sonar skip/status logging

- **Repository metadata/docs**
  - Removed Sonar badges from `README.md` (Quality Gate, Reliability).
  - Deleted `sonar-project.properties`.
  - Removed Sonar scanner documentation from `.test_deps/README.md`.
  - Removed Sonar-specific ignore rules from `.test_deps/.gitignore`.
- Deleted bundled scanner archive:
`.test_deps/sonar-scanner-cli-5.0.1.3006-linux.zip`.
- Removed leftover Sonar dictionary token from
`.idea/dictionaries/pavel.xml`.

Example of the workflow/tooling cleanup:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/test-and-release.yml
env:
  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  FORCE_COLOR: 1
```

```python
# noxfile.py (test session)
# SonarCloud submission block removed entirely.
```

commit.message:
fix: remove double JSON.stringify on Jira PUT/POST requests

The relay's postMessage handler already serializes the body. Passing
a pre-stringified string caused Jira to receive a JSON string literal
instead of an object, triggering HTTP 400: 'Cannot construct instance
of IssueUpdateBean — no String-argument constructor'.

Fixed in 5 call sites: sdPlanSetVersion (fixVersions), sdBwPostUpdate
(comment), sdBwRaiseBlocker (comment), sdPlanComment (comment), and
sdPlanTransition (transitions).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add complete Maven project with 100+ Java classes

- pom.xml with Java 17, JUnit 5 (5.10.2), Mockito (5.11.0), JaCoCo (0.8.11), Surefire (3.2.5)
- 5 enum classes in com.example.enums
- 35 model classes in com.example.model
- 40 service classes in com.example.service
- 20 utility classes in com.example.util
- PlaceholderTest with passing @Test method
- JaCoCo configured to generate reports during test phase

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Merge consecutive text blocks into single SelectableTextBlock

Reduce control count by grouping consecutive mergeable blocks
(Paragraph, Heading, Bullet, NumberedItem) into a single
SelectableTextBlock using Inline objects (Run, LineBreak).

- Add MdBlockGroup record and ComputeGroups() for heterogeneous grouping
- Add PopulateMergedInlines() with per-Run FontSize/FontWeight for headings
- Replace ApplyBlocksDiff with group-level ApplyGroupsDiff
- Add forceInlines parameter to AppendFormattedInlines to prevent
  Text-setting fast path from destroying accumulated inlines
- TaskItem and Blockquote remain unmergeable (per-item styling)
- Indented bullets stay in same-level groups

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: adopt explicit OTLP gRPC exporter and unconditional health endpoints

Changes to src/SquadCommerce.ServiceDefaults/Extensions.cs:

1. Explicit OTLP gRPC Exporter Configuration
   - Changed from parameterless UseOtlpExporter() to UseOtlpExporter(OtlpExportProtocol.Grpc, new Uri(otlpEndpoint!))
   - Transport protocol (gRPC) and endpoint are now explicit; prevents silent fallback if OTLP environment variables change format

2. Health Endpoints Available in All Environments
   - Removed IsDevelopment() gate from MapDefaultEndpoints()
   - /health and /alive endpoints now available in production
   - Required for Azure Container Apps health probes and container orchestrator liveness/readiness checks

ServiceDefaults consumers automatically receive both changes — no per-project updates needed.

All builds clean, 191 tests passing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: avoid ENAMETOOLONG on Windows for structured agent commands

Two fixes for command-line length limits on Windows (~32K chars):

1. runCommand() now writes the full command to a temp .cmd script
   instead of inlining it in cmd.exe /C, avoiding spawn ENAMETOOLONG
   when --add-dir arguments accumulate.

2. Copilot structured jobs write the prompt to a file and pass a short
   --prompt that tells copilot to read the file, since copilot's
   --prompt flag puts the full text on the process command line.
   (Codex and Claude already use stdin, so they are unaffected.)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: StrataChart fills all available horizontal space

Charts now override MeasureOverride to request the full available
width, so parent containers (e.g. left-aligned chat bubbles) expand
properly instead of collapsing to near-zero when the chart is the
only content.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: cross-reference cache ObjectId bug in affected issues report

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add AAPS backfill display bug root cause analysis

Comprehensive analysis of reported AAPS display gaps on dev branch.
Key findings:
- Confirmed: _.isEmpty(ObjectId) returns true on driver 5.x (cache bug)
- Confirmed: Debounce removal causes concurrent dataloader runs
- Confirmed: API V3 mongoCachedCollection bypasses processRawDataForRuntime
- Recommended: Fix filterForAge hasId check, re-add debounce

Test file: tests/cache-objectid-compat.test.js (7 passing tests)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix SignalR client results: use InvokeAsync for AD/SCCM cleanup

- Typed hub proxy (IHubContext<Hub, T>) uses SendAsync (fire-and-forget)
  which doesn't wait for client return values - AD cleanup never reached agent
- Switch to IHubContext<Hub> with explicit InvokeAsync<CleanupStepResult>
  which properly supports client results (request-response pattern)
- Fix no-agent scenario: mark record as Failed instead of leaving PendingApproval
- Dashboard: use AsNoTracking() for fresh DB reads after approval changes
- Both AD and SCCM cleanup now properly invoked on agent with result tracking

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix cross-repo schedule text and restore pipeline badge (#35)

* Fix cross-repo schedule text and restore pipeline badge

- Replace hardcoded 'Updated every 12h' on the cross-repo page with
  schedule descriptions derived from each repo's meta.json (e.g.
  '~4x daily / ~daily')
- Restore the GitHub Actions workflow badge SVG on all pages (index,
  cross-repo, and per-repo template) - it was replaced with plain
  text in the footer PR

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Extract shared footer into footer.js

Replace inline footer HTML in all pages with a shared footer.js script.
This eliminates the duplicated footer markup across the cross-repo page,
index page template (Build-Index.ps1), and per-repo template
(ConvertTo-ReportHtml.ps1). Future footer changes only need to update
one file.

The script detects its relative path from the src attribute to correctly
resolve the changelog link for both root and subdirectory pages.

  <script src='../footer.js'></script> so the badge appears immediately

  Indigenous water advisories, Prison healthcare

- Nav added to all 18 existing pages

commit.message:
Fix namespace references in YantraJS CLI project after refactoring

Update using statements in 6 files to reflect new namespace locations:
- Core.Core.Clr → Broiler.JavaScript.Clr
- Core.Core.Module → Broiler.JavaScript.Modules
- Core.Core.Promise → Broiler.JavaScript.BuiltIns.Promise
- Core.Core.Function → Broiler.JavaScript.BuiltIns.Function
- Core.Core.Primitive → Broiler.JavaScript.Runtime
- Core.Emit → Broiler.JavaScript.ExpressionCompiler(.Generator)
- Core.Extensions → Broiler.JavaScript.Extensions
- Add Broiler.JavaScript.Storage for KeyStrings
- Add Broiler.JavaScript.Engine for JSContext cast
- Remove unused Broiler.JavaScript.Generator reference

Fix namespace imports in Network and NodePollyfill after major refactoring

Apply namespace migration map to fix build errors:
- Add Broiler.JavaScript.Runtime for JSObject, JSValue, Arguments, etc.
- Add Broiler.JavaScript.Engine for JSContext
- Migrate Core.Core.Events → BuiltIns.Events (AbortSignal)
- Migrate Core.Core.Array.Typed and Core.Typed → BuiltIns.Array.Typed (Blob)
- Add Broiler.JavaScript.Storage to Phase2ValidationTests for KeyStrings

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix memory leaks in StrataChatComposer and MermaidCanvas

StrataChatComposer: Add OnDetachedFromVisualTree to unsubscribe
CollectionChanged handlers on external ViewModel collections
(SkillItems, McpItems, AvailableMcps) that kept the control rooted.

MermaidCanvas: Add OnDetachedFromVisualTree to stop the entrance
animation DispatcherTimer on detach, preventing the canvas and its
parent StrataMermaid from being held alive mid-animation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: restore missing ArrowRight import in Services.jsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

32 issue 002d implementar novas apis prioritárias e documentá las no scalaropenapi (#33)

* feat(repositories): add read helpers and cotahist/market queries

Add related Pydantic models in app.schemas so pre-commit ty sees consistent imports.

* feat(api): add new endpoint for intraday OHLC candles and enhance existing candle retrieval

- Introduced a new route `/fact-quotes/{ticker}/candles` to aggregate intraday OHLC candles from `fact_quotes`, utilizing hypertable data.
- Enhanced the existing `/quotes/{ticker}/candles` endpoint to support multiple intervals and improved error handling for date validation.
- Updated schemas to include `CandleRead` for consistent data representation across candle endpoints.
- Added validation for interval and date formats to ensure robust API responses.

* feat(tests): enhance API and repository tests for new endpoints and functionality

- Added integration tests for new endpoints including `/fact-quotes/{ticker}/candles`, `/etl/runs`, and `/cotahist/{ticker}/history` to ensure proper response handling.
- Updated existing tests to verify the presence of new paths in the OpenAPI schema.
- Introduced unit tests for asset detail orchestration and candle bucketing, improving coverage for asset overview and technical indicators.
- Created a new integration test file for market data repositories, validating database interactions and data retrieval.

* feat(api): add asset coverage and overview endpoints

- Introduced new endpoints `/assets/{ticker}/coverage` and `/assets/{ticker}/overview` to provide detailed asset data coverage and consolidated overviews.
- Implemented corresponding use case functions `build_asset_coverage` and `build_asset_overview` to handle data retrieval and response formatting.
- Updated asset-related schemas to include `AssetCoverageRead` and `AssetOverviewRead` for structured API responses.
- Created a new module `asset_detail.py` to encapsulate asset detail orchestration logic.

* feat(api): add COTAHIST and market overview endpoints

- Introduced new API routes for COTAHIST data, including `/cotahist/{ticker}/history` and a filterable list endpoint.
- Added a market overview endpoint at `/market/overview` to provide aggregated metrics for trading days.
- Updated the main FastAPI application to include the new routers for COTAHIST and market functionalities.
- Enhanced API documentation to reflect the new endpoints and their descriptions.

* feat(quotes): implement OHLC candle generation and technical indicators

- Added `candles.py` to build OHLC candles from daily quotes and intraday points, including functions for daily and intraday candle aggregation.
- Introduced `indicators.py` for calculating technical indicators such as SMA, EMA, and RSI on close-price series.
- Implemented validation functions for interval and period inputs to ensure correct usage.
- Enhanced data handling with functions to clip candles chronologically and build indicator series from date and close-price lists.

* feat(api): enhance ETL run history endpoint and add market data constants

- Introduced a new endpoint `/etl/runs` to list ETL run history with pagination and filtering options for pipeline name, status, source date, and started_at window.
- Added helper functions to parse datetime filters and convert ETL run data into a structured response format.
- Created a new module `market_data_constants.py` to define constants for market-data APIs, including accepted candle intervals and indicator names, along with sensible bounds for indicator periods.

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(api): update route paths for COTAHIST and fact quotes endpoints

- Changed the route path for the COTAHIST history endpoint from an empty string to a trailing slash for consistency.
- Enhanced error handling in the fact quotes endpoint to raise an HTTPException when the requested range exceeds the allowed points limit, providing clearer guidance for users.

* fix(tests): correct COTAHIST endpoint path in integration test

- Updated the integration test for the OpenAPI schema to reflect the correct route path for the COTAHIST endpoint by adding a trailing slash.

* refactor(repository): update return type for get_latest_for_ticker method and enhance description in AssetOverviewRead schema

- Changed the return type of the get_latest_for_ticker method to indicate it can return a FactQuote or None.
- Improved the description of the latest_update_at field in the AssetOverviewRead schema for clarity on its purpose and data source.

* refactor(asset_detail): remove unused asset timestamps from build_asset_overview function

- Eliminated the extension of asset creation and update timestamps from the updates list in the build_asset_overview function, streamlining the code.

commit.message:
feat: 修复XMind空步骤bug + 添加归档MD同步与用户验证循环

Bug 修复:
- json-to-xmind.mjs: 添加 validateJson() 预校验函数
- buildCaseTopic: 空步骤/预期使用 fallback 文本 + console.warn
- 兼容多种 key 名称 (step/action/操作步骤, expected/result/预期结果)

新增功能:
- 新建 json-to-archive-md.mjs 脚本 (327行)
  - 模式1: JSON → archive-cases MD
  - 模式2: --from-xmind XMind → archive-cases MD
- 工作流从 8 步扩展为 10 步:
  - Step 9: 归档 MD 同步 + 用户验证提示
  - Step 10: 用户验证后同步（条件执行）
- xmind-converter: 临时文件清理延迟到 Step 10

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
